system.description: When you **_inspect a work of artifice or magic for a fatal flaw_**, roll +INT: **_on a 7+_**, the GM will reveal the best way to destroy/sabotage it; **on a 10+**, you or an ally also gain advantage to act on the info.

success.value: The GM reveals the best way to destroy/sabotage it, and you or an ally gain advantage to act on the info.

partial.value: The GM reveals the best way to destroy/sabotage it.
